scrape.description: ELITE MERIT REAL ESTATE presents this exceptional opportunity to own a premium residence in The Pinnacle at Sobha Central, a landmark development redefining elevated living along Sheikh Zayed Road in Dubai. PROPERTY HIGHLIGHTS • 1 Bedroom Apartment | 639.19 sqft | AED 2,187,575 • Located in The Pinnacle at Sobha Central • Part of a master community featuring six interconnected towers • Tallest residential tower within the development offering premium positioning • Contemporary layouts with panoramic skyline views of Downtown, DIFC & Dubai Marina • Floor-to-ceiling windows maximizing light and openness • Designed with a focus on elevation, vision, and refined living • Premium finishes with modern, elegant interiors • Integrated community lifestyle with residential, retail, and office spaces PAYMENT PLAN • Flexible and investor-friendly payment structure • Phased installments linked to construction progress • Attractive booking terms available • Designed to support long-term investment growth AMENITIES • Swimming pools including lap pool, leisure pool & kids’ pool • Fully equipped fitness zones & outdoor exercise spaces • Jogging tracks and landscaped green parks • Outdoor cinema and entertainment areas • Sports facilities including football ground & cricket practice area • Children’s play areas and activity zones • BBQ areas and family gathering spaces • Retail promenade with cafes, boutiques, and daily conveniences • Co-working lounges and business center within the community • Landscaped gardens, courtyards, and open leisure spaces KEY INVESTMENT HIGHLIGHTS • Prime location on Sheikh Zayed Road – Dubai’s main business corridor • Developed by Sobha Realty – known for quality and premium developments • High demand for centrally located luxury apartments • Strong capital appreciation potential due to iconic positioning • Mixed-use master development combining residential, retail & office spaces • Limited availability in a landmark high-rise tower • Ideal for both investors and end-users seeking prestige living ROAD CONNECTIVITY • Direct access to Sheikh Zayed Road connecting major city hubs • Seamless connectivity to Downtown Dubai, DIFC & Dubai Marina • Dedicated entry and exit lanes for smooth traffic flow • Exclusive fly-out bridge from podium level ensuring easy access • Close proximity to metro connectivity within the development • Quick connectivity for travel within Dubai and towards Abu Dhabi ABOUT THE PROJECT The Pinnacle at Sobha Central is a signature high-rise development positioned at the heart of Dubai, offering a refined urban lifestyle defined by height, design, and perspective. As the tallest tower within a fully integrated master community, it delivers uninterrupted panoramic views and a sense of exclusivity that sets it apart. Set along Sheikh Zayed Road, the project combines residential elegance with seamless connectivity, premium amenities, and a vibrant mixed-use environment. Designed for modern living, it offers a balanced lifestyle where work, leisure, and wellness coexist effortlessly within one of Dubai’s most strategic and and prestigious locations.
scrape.listing_title: City Living | Stunning Skyline Views | High ROI
